text: The anticipation rises as I walk toward the glass doors, peering into a space filled with bold, inviting colors and intriguing shapes. Inside, surrounded by the language of research and development, I feel a hum of curiosity. The environment challenges me to both explore new knowledge and pause to contemplate. I am reminded of the power of inquiry, and though the setting is unfamiliar, I feel strangely at home amid the dance of ideas unfolding around me.
